MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-19-276767 WITH CASE CGC-20-276845
Off Calendar Dec-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing through CourtCall for plaintiff and moving party Troy Sullivan and Elizabeth Sullivan.
Florence McClain of LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP (415-362-2580), appearing through CourtCall for defendant Trimon Inc.
Mirna J. Scheffy of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3225) appearing through CourtCall for defendant Triple A Machine Shop Inc.
Damion M. Young of BUCHALTER, APC (949) 760-1121, appearing through CourtCall for defendant Caterpillar, Inc.
Jonathan Kim of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing through CourtCall for defendant Anheuser-Busch LLC.

Matter called simultaneously with line 1, CGC-19-276767.

RULING:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion to Consolidate Actions, CGC-19-276767 with Case CGC-20-276845 is granted. No opposition filed. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes including trial. Case CGC-19-276767 shall be the lead case. Subsequent documents must be filed only in the lead case and all documents filed in the consolidated case must include the caption and case number of the lead case, followed by the case number of the other consolidated case. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.3350.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
